<table align="center" width="100%">
<tr>
<td align="center"> <h1> <span class="mw-headline">Liero 1.0</span></h1>
</td></tr></table>

'''Liero 1.0''' is one of the most popular mods in Liero Xtreme. It is also the default mod and the most respectfully played [[Mod|mod]] in the game.

== Settings ==
The two most popular settings in this mod is [[Rifles]] and [[Limited]]. Played well by almost any respectable clan. Some other settings that are not played as much are [[Firebird]] and [[Unlimited]]. A list can be found below.

* [[Rifles|Only rifles at 20% loading time]]
* [[Limited|Limited weapons at 100% loading time]]
* [[Firebird]]
* [[Unlimited|A cast of weapons played at 100% loading time]]

== Weapon List ==
* Bazooka
* Big Nuke
* Blaster
* Booby Trap
* Bouncy Larpa
* Bouncy Mine
* Cannon
* Chaingun
* Chiquita Bomb
* Cluster Bomb
* Crackler
* Dart
* Dirt Ball
* Doomsday
* Explosives
* Flamer
* Float Mine
* Guass Gun
* Grasshopper
* Greenball
* Handgun
* Hellraider
* Larpa
* Laser
* Mine
* Mini Nuke
* Mini Rockets
* Minigun
* Napalm
* RB Rampage
* Rifle
* Shotgun
* Spikeballs
* Super Shotgun
* Uzi
* Winchester
* Zimm

<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<tr>
<th class="MainPageBG" style="margin:0; background: #EFEFE6; font-size:100%; font-weight:bold; border:1px solid #D5D2D2; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;" width="100%"> <center>Popular Mods</center>
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: white; color:#000; margin:0; border:1px solid #a3bfb1; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;"> <center>   <strong class="selflink">Liero 1.0</strong> | [[Liero 1.11]] | [[Modern Warfare]] | [[Cruel]] | [[8-Bit Warfare]] | [[Food Fight]] | [[WH40k]] | [[MSF]] | [[Trick or Treat]]   </center>
</td></tr></table>
<p><br/>
</p>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>

[[Category:Mods]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130323070528/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Liero_1.0 -->
